occupations.title: All Occupations
occupations.ai_rationale: Aggregate category covering all occupations; score reflects the overall workforce mix.

occupations.title: Management Occupations
occupations.ai_rationale: Management occupations are predominantly knowledge-based; AI accelerates analysis and reporting but strategic leadership retains strong human requirements.

occupations.title: Marketing Managers

occupations.title: Sales Managers

occupations.title: Conveyor Operators and Tenders
occupations.ai_rationale: Conveyor operators and tenders control automated material transport systems; physical monitoring and adjustment are hands-on.

occupations.title: Crane and Tower Operators
occupations.ai_rationale: Crane and tower operators lift and move heavy materials; physical equipment operation in construction and industrial settings requires human presence.

occupations.title: Hoist and Winch Operators
occupations.ai_rationale: Hoist and winch operators raise and lower materials; physical equipment operation requires human presence.

occupations.title: Industrial Truck and Tractor Operators
occupations.ai_rationale: Industrial truck and tractor operators drive forklifts and pallet jacks; physical vehicle operation in warehouses requires human presence.

occupations.title: Cleaners of Vehicles and Equipment
occupations.ai_rationale: Cleaners of vehicles and equipment wash and clean vehicles; physical cleaning work is hands-on.

occupations.title: Laborers and Freight, Stock, and Material Movers, Hand
occupations.ai_rationale: Laborers and freight and material movers load and move materials by hand; physical labor is the core function.

occupations.title: Machine Feeders and Offbearers
occupations.ai_rationale: Machine feeders and offbearers load and unload production equipment; physical machine tending is hands-on.

occupations.title: Packers and Packagers, Hand
occupations.ai_rationale: Packers and packagers pack products into containers by hand or machine; physical packing work is hands-on.

occupations.title: Stockers and Order Fillers
occupations.ai_rationale: Stockers and order fillers retrieve and place products in warehouses; AI-guided picking systems are advancing but physical retrieval and stocking require human workers.

occupations.title: Refuse and Recyclable Material Collectors
occupations.ai_rationale: Refuse and recyclable material collectors collect and transport waste; physical collection work requires human presence.

occupations.title: Material Moving Workers, All Other
occupations.ai_rationale: All other material moving workers perform physical material handling tasks; hands-on work limits AI substitutability.
